{{CargoRelic
|name=Gemini
|class_id=21731
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Maidens toss coins in the river's hush,
Yearning whispers from lovers in secret rush.
|fame=55
|art=70
|fth=110
|civ=61
|tech=69
|ss1=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%
|ss2=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%
|ss3=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%
|ss4=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%
|ss5=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%
|ss6=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%
|ss7=Snail HARD Stats +500<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +50<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +20%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +2 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Travel SPD +9%
|skill2=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Cells collected +30%
|skill3=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, B-tads gained +15%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Gemini Star|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Dante|3rec=1.10M|3atk=22566|3defense=15048|3hp=197950|3weak=?
|4name=Marilyn|4rec=2.33M|4atk=36059|4defense=24045|4hp=427386|4weak=?
|5name=Victoria I|5rec=4.60M|5atk=53370|5defense=35589|5hp=824264|5weak=?
|6name=Genghis Khan|6rec=8.53M|6atk=74892|6defense=49941|6hp=1467492|6weak=?
|Arec=14.93M|Aatk=100981|Adefense=67337|Ahp=2445523|Aweak=?
}}}}
